title: Outpost Theme
description: Schema for Outpost CMS theme.json files. Validates theme metadata and optional customizer configuration.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE validation and autocomplete.

name.description: Display name shown in the admin theme browser. Does not need to match the directory slug.

version.description: Semantic version string (e.g. "1.0.0"). Displayed as a badge on the theme card.

author.description: Theme creator name. Shown in the theme details panel.

description.description: A short summary of the theme's purpose and style. Shown beneath the theme name in the browser.

screenshot.description: Filename or relative path of a preview image within the theme directory (PNG or JPG).

managed.description: When true, marks this theme as managed by Outpost. Managed themes receive automatic updates. Do not set this on custom themes.

customizer.description: Declares customizable properties for the visual Theme Customizer (Admin > Customize).

sections.description: Each section becomes a tab in the customizer UI.

label.description: Display label shown as the section tab name.

key.description: Unique key for storing/retrieving this field's value (e.g. "color-accent").

label.description: Display label shown next to the field in the customizer.

type.description: Field type that determines the UI control.

default.description: Default value for this field. Type depends on the field type (hex string for color, font name for font, boolean for toggle, string for text).

var.description: CSS custom property name to override (e.g. "--color-accent"). Used by color and font fields.
